prompt: Generate the lyrics of "Shape of You" by Ed Sheeran
response:
The lyrics of "Shape of You" by Ed Sheeran are a song by English singer-songwriter Ed Sheeran. It was released on 11 February 2017 as the lead single from his second studio album ÷ (2017). The song was written by Sheeran, Steve Mac, and Steve Booker, and produced by Mac and Booker. It is a pop song with influences of indie rock and soul music.

The song was met with positive reviews from music critics, who praised its production and Sheeran's vocal performance. It was also a commercial success, topping the charts in several countries, including the United Kingdom, Ireland, Australia, Canada, and the United States. The song has been certified platinum in the United Kingdom, Canada, and the United States, and has sold over 1.5 million copies worldwide.

Background and release

"Shape of You" was written by Ed Sheeran, Steve Mac, and Steve Booker, and produced by Mac and Booker. It was recorded at the Shangri-La Studios in Malibu, California, and at the Westlake Recording Studios in West Hollywood, California. The song was mixed by Serban Ghenea at the Mixstar Studios in Virginia Beach, Virginia, and mastered by John Hanes at the Sterling Sound Studios in New York City.

"Shape of You" was released on 11 February 2017 as the lead single from Sheeran's second studio album ÷ (2017). It was released as a digital download in the United Kingdom on 11 February 2017, and in the United States on 12 February 2017.

Composition
"Shape of You" is a pop song with influences of indie rock and soul music. It has a length of three minutes and fifty-five seconds. The song is written in the key of A minor, and is set in common time with a tempo of 120 beats per minute. Sheeran's vocal range spans from the low note of A3 to the high note of A5.

Critical reception
"Shape of You" received positive reviews from music critics. Michael Cragg of The Guardian called it "a song that is both a celebration of the power of love and a warning about the dangers of it". He also wrote that the song "is a reminder that Sheeran is a pop star, not a folk singer".

Writing for The Independent, Nick Levine called the song "a great pop song" and wrote that it "is a reminder that Sheeran is a pop star, not a folk singer". He also wrote that the song "is a reminder that Sheeran is a pop star, not a folk singer".

In the United Kingdom, "Shape of You" debuted at number one on the UK Singles Chart, becoming Sheeran's third number-one single. It also became his first number-one single in Ireland, and his first number-one single in Australia. In the United States, the song debuted at number one on the Billboard Hot 100, becoming Sheeran's first number-one single in the country. It also became his first number-one single in Canada, and his first number-one single in New Zealand.

Music video
The music video for "Shape of You" was directed by Emil Nava and released on 11 February 2017. It was filmed in Los Angeles, California, and features Sheeran and his band performing the song in a room. The video was shot in black and white, and features a number of close-up shots of Sheeran's face.

Live performances

He also performed the song on The Voice UK on 12 February 2017, and on The Voice Australia on 13 February 2017. Sheeran performed the song on The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon on 14 February 2017, and on Saturday Night Live on 16 February 2017.
